rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes; use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Generate AGREE contracts with valid logical operators and expression patterns.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the AADL model for AGREE expressions.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions.
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
Encode range assumptions and guarantees using named constants and visible features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Employ temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested `if-then-else` for branching logic.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Avoid using AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed exposure.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and architecture grounding details
